ocr_findings.description: Page number '300' appears at top of OCR rather than bottom. Cosmetic only.
Answer line 'ア' choice layout for 問題8-14 and 8-15 in the upper section uses tab-separated inline format in OCR (e.g. 'ア. 株主　イ. 監査役　ウ. 経営者　エ. 内部監査人') which matches the image layout accurately.

reviewer_notes: Mixed exam+answer page: two questions (8-14, 8-15) at top with answer key line, then 解答・解説 section covering 8-10 through 8-15. All answer letters and explanatory text are captured accurately. The 解答・解説 banner heading is present. High fidelity.
